arts.sum: Evan Ferguson moving on loan to West Ham United in the winter transfer window made perfect sense when the switch reunited him with Graham Potter.... The post 'Says it all...' - Sky Sports pundit feels sorry for what Potter did to West Ham player v So'ton appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Ugochukwu stuns West Ham to move Southampton level with Derby’s total
arts.sum: Lesley Ugochukwu’s added-time equaliser ensured Southampton equalled Derby’s record-low Premier League points total with a 1-1 draw at West Ham. The already-relegated Saints were still on course to be crowned the worst team in Premier League history after Jarrod Bowen fired the hosts into the lead. But they were not even the worst team at the London Stadium for long periods of a dreadful game, and they snatched a deserved point deep into added time when the Chelsea loanee Ugochukwu drove home through a crowded penalty area. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Southampton tie Derby record with late equaliser
arts.sum: Southampton moved closer to avoiding the all time lowest Premier League points total with a late 1-1 draw against West Ham United on Saturday.

arts.ttl: West Ham 1-1 Southampton: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Saints avoid unwanted Premier League points record
arts.sum: Southampton ensured that they would not finish the season with the worst-ever Premier League points total as they struck late to hold West Ham United to a 1-1 draw.

arts.ttl: Graham Potter’s tough West Ham start continues as Southampton salvage point
arts.sum: West Ham 1-1 Southampton: The Saints at least matched Derby’s record-low points tally of 11

arts.ttl: Southampton equal Derby’s 11-point total with late draw at West Ham
arts.sum: Derby saw their record-low points tally of 11 from the 2007-08 Premier League season matched.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils to step up Tyler Dibling pursuit on 'one key condition'
arts.sum: Manchester United will reportedly step up their interest in Southampton attacker Tyler Dibling only if one key condition is met.
